Reviews Contact

About Horizon Pest Control

12+ years serving Tampa and surrounding areas

Founded in 2011 by Tampa native Jason Miller, Horizon Pest Control started with one truck and a mission to protect local families from unwanted pests. What began as a small operation serving South Tampa bungalows has grown into a trusted name across Hillsborough County.

We take a science-based approach to pest management, using the latest techniques adapted for Florida's unique climate. Our team spends time understanding each home's specific needs, whether it's a historic bungalow in Seminole Heights or a new condo along Bayshore Boulevard.

As active members of the Tampa community, we're proud to support local schools and hurricane preparedness initiatives. When you choose Horizon, you're choosing neighbors who care about your family's safety and comfort.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Horizon Pest Control

Trusted pest control professionals serving Tampa, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
